title: cattleya × raganii
intro: Cattleya × raganii is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya aurantiaca. This plant is valued for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cattleya × raganii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant's roots and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies, often in the form of infusions or tinctures.
